visual_description: A blue boat with orange trim carries three men across dark water at night, with one man standing at the bow. The scene cuts to a man in a dark shirt standing beside a parked car on a dimly lit street, looking ahead. He then holds a phone to his ear, and later a man in a suit and another man in a cap are shown speaking on phones in indoor and outdoor night settings.
audio_description: A man's voice is heard speaking into a phone, accompanied by faint ambient sounds.
